nodes.label: AI for meeting notes and task extraction
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI for zoom meeting notes... summarizes it into categories and then breaks out the different tasks

nodes.label: AI as explanation aid for client communication
nodes.grounding_span: I also use it to help explain difficult ideas to clients

nodes.label: Personal touch in client communications
nodes.grounding_span: I still prefer client communications to come from myself... It still feels a little impersonal

nodes.label: Collaborative editing of AI outputs
nodes.grounding_span: I collaborate and use bits and pieces... I am still tweaking and correcting them

nodes.label: AI for staying current with complex topics
nodes.grounding_span: I used it to help summarize the new effects of the new tax bill

nodes.label: Workflow efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: It cut minutes off of my post-meeting workflow

nodes.label: Client trust and personal relationships
nodes.grounding_span: We build deep relationships built on trust

nodes.label: Knowledge and understanding
nodes.grounding_span: It's helpful to have a tool to summarize difficult topics to you in a readable way

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for meeting notes
Preference for personal client communication

nodes.label: Optimism about future industry-specific AI tools
nodes.grounding_span: I look forward to trying, and utilizing some in my career
